hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *wailsjs/*) echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit generated Wails bindings in frontend/wailsjs/. Modify the Go source in app.go and run wails generate module instead.' ;; *pnpm-lock.yaml*) echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit pnpm-lock.yaml directly. Use pnpm install/add/remove instead.' ;; *) echo 'ALLOW' ;; esac
